'''Horvat''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] henchman of [[Guldus Bemm]] who worked on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Canyon]]. Under orders from Bemm, Horvat attempted to lead a group of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] representatives into an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] trap.

==Appearances==
